generated_by: Wakaf Produktif Kebun Kopi Ngantang — Monitor V2

title.id: Tim Lapangan Baru Disepakati — Era Self-Managed Dimulai
title.en: New Field Team Confirmed — Self-Managed Era Begins

detail.id: Notulen rapat 1-2 Mei 2026 menetapkan struktur tim lapangan baru: Mas Anto sebagai Koordinator (sweat equity), Cak Yit sebagai pekerja bagian atas pohon (pemangkasan, sambung pucuk Robusta klon unggul), Pak Kumpul sebagai pekerja bagian bawah (pemupukan, sanitasi, build rorak). Strategi kopi-durian dikonfirmasi sebagai integrasi multi-komoditas. Anggaran awal Rp 8 jt disetujui untuk tahap inisiasi. Inilah titik awal Fase 4: Self-Managed Phase setelah transisi dari pengelolaan partner sebelumnya.
detail.en: Meeting notes May 1-2, 2026 establish new field team structure: Mas Anto as Coordinator (sweat equity), Cak Yit for upper-tree work (pruning, Robusta top-grafting), Pak Kumpul for ground-level (fertilization, sanitation, soil pits). Coffee-durian strategy confirmed as multi-commodity integration. Initial budget Rp 8M approved for initiation phase. This marks the start of Phase 4: Self-Managed Phase after transition from previous partner management.

title.id: Kunjungan BRIN Purwodadi — Adopsi Prinsip SOP-First
title.en: BRIN Purwodadi Visit — SOP-First Principle Adopted

detail.id: Kunjungan strategis ke BRIN (Badan Riset dan Inovasi Nasional) Cabang Purwodadi sebagai langkah profesionalisasi pengelolaan kebun. Hasil utama: (1) prinsip SOP-first ditegaskan — mengikuti SOP Robusta Edisi 2 (Kementan + Puslit Koka 2019) sebagai baseline, (2) identifikasi rootstock kebun sebagai Excelsa lama yang sudah di-top-graft Robusta, (3) MoU senilai Rp 50 jt untuk pendampingan riset multi-tahun. Konsultasi BRIN menjadi rujukan agronomi institusional formal kebun wakaf Ngantang.
detail.en: Strategic visit to BRIN (National Research and Innovation Agency) Purwodadi Branch as a professionalization step. Key outcomes: (1) SOP-first principle confirmed — following Robusta SOP 2nd Edition (Kementan + Puslit Koka 2019) as baseline, (2) garden rootstock identified as old Excelsa that has been top-grafted with Robusta, (3) MoU worth Rp 50M for multi-year research collaboration. BRIN consultation becomes the formal institutional agronomic reference for Ngantang waqf coffee garden.

detail.id: Sesi mendalam Wakif menjawab 13 pertanyaan klarifikasi hasil deep-dive analisis SOP Robusta Edisi 2 vs Grand Desain. Keputusan kunci: stop top-graft Arabika fokus klon Robusta unggul (BP 358/SA 237), composting in-situ kulit kopi pulping, spek pupuk SOP penuh (Urea+SP36+KCl+Dolomit bukan NPK generic), petik selektif merah default, tanam ulang lamtoro PG 79 + durian 10×10 m, build 15-20 rorak prioritas Bidang 3, soil test ke Lab UB Brawijaya, mitra hybrid Bonsari Coffee + penggilingan lokal, target SNI Mutu 3 → 2 → 1 bertahap. Plus tambahan On-Farm Inject decisions: lanjut biochar pyrolysis investasi Rp 1,5-2 jt, pilot Arachis pintoi (cover crop) di Bidang 4 Rumah Wakif.
detail.en: Deep wakif session answering 13 clarification questions from SOP Robusta 2nd Edition vs Grand Design analysis. Key decisions: stop Arabica top-graft focus on superior Robusta clones (BP 358/SA 237), in-situ composting of coffee pulp, full SOP fertilizer spec (Urea+SP36+KCl+Dolomite not generic NPK), selective red picking as default, replant lamtoro PG 79 + 10×10m durian, build 15-20 priority soil pits in Bidang 3, soil test to UB Brawijaya Lab, hybrid partner Bonsari Coffee + local mill, SNI Quality 3→2→1 gradual target. Plus On-Farm Inject decisions: continue biochar pyrolysis investment Rp 1.5-2M, pilot Arachis pintoi (cover crop) in Bidang 4 Rumah Wakif.

title.id: RAB Final 2 Siklus Locked — Saving Rp 22,94 jt (24%)
title.en: Final RAB 2 Cycles Locked — Saving Rp 22.94M (24%)

detail.id: Rencana Anggaran Biaya (RAB) finalized untuk Siklus 2026 (Mei-Sep) Rp 27,055 jt + Siklus 2027 (Okt 2026-Sep 2027) Rp 44,235 jt — total Rp 71,29 jt. Saving Rp 22,94 jt (24%) dari draft awal Rp 94,23 jt melalui review Wakif: cuts hard pada items overbudget (Urea Mei skip, Dolomit defer, pupuk kandang dari kompos ayam Wahab, moisture meter via Bonsari, pulper CUT pakai jasa penggilingan), adjust based on BRIN dosis correction (over-allocation di Urea/SP-36/KCl yang dikoreksi pakai BRIN tabel umur 5-10 thn × 750 phn ideal post-selection), serta add-back jasa penggilingan Rp 1.500/kg green bean. Pendekatan transparant + cost-effective tanpa kompromi quality SOP.
detail.en: Budget Plan (RAB) finalized for Cycle 2026 (May-Sep) Rp 27.055M + Cycle 2027 (Oct 2026-Sep 2027) Rp 44.235M — total Rp 71.29M. Savings Rp 22.94M (24%) from initial draft Rp 94.23M through Wakif review: hard cuts on overbudget items (Urea May skip, Dolomite defer, organic fertilizer from Wahab chicken compost, moisture meter via Bonsari, pulper CUT use milling service), BRIN dosage correction adjustments (Urea/SP-36/KCl over-allocation corrected using BRIN table age 5-10 years × 750 ideal trees post-selection), plus add-back milling service Rp 1,500/kg green bean. Transparent + cost-effective approach without compromising SOP quality.

title.id: Dosis Pupuk BRIN Locked — Tabel Per Umur Tanaman + Aturan Scaling
title.en: BRIN Fertilizer Dosage Locked — Per-Age Table + Scaling Rule

detail.id: BRIN tabel dosis pupuk per umur tanaman diadopsi sebagai standar (Urea 150g, SP-36 80g, KCl 100g, Kieserit 50g per pohon per ½ aplikasi untuk umur 5-10 thn). Aturan universal scaling: dosis_BRIN(g/phn) × jumlah_pohon_aktual = total_kg. Pre-panen 2026: 915 phn aktual. Post-Nov 2026 (post-selection seleksi tebang): target 750 phn ideal (density 1.333 phn/ha jarak 3×2,5 m). Penambahan Kieserit (Mg+S larut cepat) sebagai pupuk baru — komplemen Dolomit yang slow-release. Saving Rp ~5,3 jt per tahun dari over-allocation correction sebelumnya.
detail.en: BRIN per-age fertilizer dosage table adopted as standard (Urea 150g, SP-36 80g, KCl 100g, Kieserit 50g per tree per ½ application for ages 5-10 years). Universal scaling rule: BRIN_dose(g/tree) × actual_tree_count = total_kg. Pre-harvest 2026: 915 actual trees. Post-Nov 2026 (post-thinning selection): target 750 ideal trees (density 1,333 trees/ha at 3×2.5m spacing). Kieserit added as new fertilizer (fast-soluble Mg+S) — complement to slow-release Dolomite. Savings Rp ~5.3M annually from previous over-allocation correction.

title.id: Pemupukan Mei Partial — Mitigation Mode Save Panen
title.en: May Partial Fertilization — Mitigation Mode to Save Harvest

detail.id: Strategi mitigation: aplikasi SP-36 + KCl partial (BUKAN full SOP) untuk save panen yang sudah dalam fase pengisian biji. Justifikasi agronomis: bunga sudah set Maret-April, biji dalam pengisian, ½ dosis Urea (Nitrogen) di Mei impact minimal dan bisa malah dorong vegetative growth yang ganggu pengisian. Hanya P (SP-36) untuk energy transfer + K (KCl) untuk kualitas biji yang diaplikasikan. Total: SP-36 ~73 kg (2 sak) + KCl ~92 kg (2 sak) = Rp 1,24 jt. Full SOP (semua 5 pupuk dosis penuh) ditunda ke Nov MH siklus 2027 setelah seleksi pohon pasca-panen tuntas.
detail.en: Mitigation strategy: partial SP-36 + KCl application (NOT full SOP) to save harvest already in bean-filling phase. Agronomic justification: flowers set in March-April, beans filling, ½ Urea (Nitrogen) dose in May has minimal impact and may instead push vegetative growth that disrupts filling. Only P (SP-36) for energy transfer + K (KCl) for bean quality are applied. Total: SP-36 ~73 kg (2 sacks) + KCl ~92 kg (2 sacks) = Rp 1.24M. Full SOP (all 5 fertilizers full dose) deferred to Nov MH 2027 cycle after post-harvest tree selection complete.

title.id: Brocap Pilot di Bidang 4 — Baseline Monitoring PBKo
title.en: Brocap Pilot at Bidang 4 — PBKo Baseline Monitoring

detail.id: Pemasangan 5 unit Brocap trap di Bidang 4 (Rumah Wakif, ~10-15 pohon) sebagai pilot baseline monitoring Penggerek Buah Kopi (PBKo, Hypothenemus hampei). Per jurnal Wiryadiputra & Cilas (2009), timing optimal full deploy adalah 4 bulan post-panen (Nov-Des 2026 untuk siklus panen Jul-Sep 2026). Pilot Mei = baseline data + learning untuk full deployment 50 unit Bidang 1-3 di Nov-Des 2026. Pilot ini bagian dari Inisiatif On-Farm Inovasi pertama yang dijalankan kebun wakaf Ngantang.
detail.en: Installation of 5 Brocap traps in Bidang 4 (Wakif Residence, ~10-15 trees) as baseline pilot monitoring for Coffee Berry Borer (PBKo, Hypothenemus hampei). Per Wiryadiputra & Cilas (2009), optimal timing for full deployment is 4 months post-harvest (Nov-Dec 2026 for July-Sep 2026 harvest cycle). May pilot = baseline data + learning for full deployment of 50 units in Bidang 1-3 in Nov-Dec 2026. This pilot is part of the first On-Farm Innovation Initiative being run at Ngantang waqf coffee garden.

title.id: Transisi Tenaga Ahli — Konsolidasi Tim Internal
title.en: Technical Advisor Transition — Internal Team Consolidation

detail.id: Per 10 Mei 2026, Tenaga Ahli yang sebelumnya membantu intervensi pra-panen Q1 2026 tidak lagi aktif terlibat dalam tim. Rujukan agronomi institusional sekarang via BRIN Purwodadi (eksternal, sesuai MoU 5 Mei). Konsolidasi pengelolaan ke tim internal: Wakif (Adib Asrori, M.Psi, Psikolog) sebagai Program Director, Hendy Kurniansyah sebagai Strategic & Systems Executive, plus tim lapangan (Mas Anto, Cak Yit, Pak Kumpul). Transisi ini bagian dari Fase 4: Self-Managed Phase — fokus pada eksekusi SOP harian yang terdokumentasi dengan baik sambil membuka diri untuk kemitraan strategis baru yang aligned dengan filosofi wakaf.
detail.en: As of May 10, 2026, the Technical Advisor who previously assisted with Q1 2026 pre-harvest interventions is no longer actively involved in the team. Institutional agronomic reference is now via BRIN Purwodadi (external, per May 5 MoU). Management consolidated to internal team: Wakif (Adib Asrori, M.Psi, Psikolog) as Program Director, Hendy Kurniansyah as Strategic & Systems Executive, plus field team (Mas Anto, Cak Yit, Pak Kumpul). This transition is part of Phase 4: Self-Managed Phase — focusing on well-documented daily SOP execution while remaining open to new strategic partnerships aligned with waqf philosophy.
